data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.
data.assessment: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #3' requires confirmation of the scenario behavior regarding individual cancellation within a group. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API endpoints or state checks that demonstrate this functionality. The linked use case discusses the ability to skip specific dates but lacks concrete evidence to validate the expected outcome of the scenario, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or state checks confirming the ability to handle individual cancellations within a group.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ability to cancel an individual within a group.
